title: The Immortal's Curse: Ashwatthama #mythology #comic #shorts
description: Condemned to walk the earth forever with an unhealing wound. The terrifying curse of Ashwatthama. #Mahabharata #Lore #GraphicNovel

scenes.narration: Immortality is usually a gift. For him, it was the ultimate punishment.
scenes.image_prompt: Close up of a shadowy warrior's glowing, rage-filled eyes, a glowing gem embedded in his forehead, dark fantasy graphic novel style, heavy ink shadows, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: At the end of a devastating war, Ashwatthama committed an unforgivable crime in the dead of night.
scenes.image_prompt: Silhouette of a warrior standing over a burning camp, holding a bloodied sword, comic book panel art, stark red and black contrast, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: In retaliation, he unleashed an apocalyptic weapon, threatening to destroy all future generations.
scenes.image_prompt: A massive, blinding beam of divine energy descending from the sky, stylized explosive comic art, dynamic lines, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But he was stopped by a god. And the judgment delivered was merciless.
scenes.image_prompt: A glowing, majestic divine figure pointing a commanding finger at a kneeling, defeated warrior, dramatic lighting, graphic novel illustration, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The sacred gem of protection was torn from his forehead, leaving a wound that would never heal.
scenes.image_prompt: Close up of the gem being ripped from the forehead, raw stylized blood, heavy shadows, visceral comic art style, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: He was cursed to wander the earth for three thousand years.
scenes.image_prompt: A lone, cloaked figure walking through a desolate, barren wasteland, harsh wind, dark comic aesthetic, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: No one would offer him food. No one would offer him shelter. He would carry the stench of blood and decay forever.
scenes.image_prompt: Villagers turning their backs and closing doors on a wretched, diseased beggar in shadows, moody cel-shaded illustration, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Some claim that deep in the forests, an abnormally tall man with a bleeding forehead still wanders today.
scenes.image_prompt: Modern dense forest at night, a towering, shadowy figure with a glowing, bleeding mark on his head partially hidden behind trees, creepy comic book art, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Waiting for the end of time. Waiting for release.
scenes.image_prompt: The warrior looking up at a starry night sky, rain falling on his cursed wound, tragic and dark comic style, fade to black, vertical 1080x1920
